name: tsk-protocol
description: Beta shared-secret API authentication with server-authoritative segmented credential state

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/client-sdk && npm run build -w packages/bpc-bridge
scripts.test: npx tsx test-suite.mts && npx tsx lifecycle-suite.mts && npx tsx hotp-exhaustion-suite.mts && npx tsx client-lifecycle-suite.mts && npx tsx store-durability-suite.mts && npx tsx anomaly-integration-suite.mts && npx tsx attack-suite.mts && npx tsx adversarial-proof.mts && npx tsx ultra-bridge-test.mts && npx tsx runtime-capture-suite.mts
scripts.test:ha: npx tsx replicating-tumbler-suite.mts && npx tsx replica-receiver-suite.mts && npx tsx failover-promotion-suite.mts
scripts.test:postgres:ha: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-hotp-outbox-integration.mts
scripts.test:pg-partition: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-pg-partition-drill.mts
scripts.test:credential-authority: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-credential-authority-drill.mts
scripts.test:ha-fencing: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-ha-fencing-drill.mts
scripts.test:source-fence: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-source-fence-drill.mts
scripts.test:source-fence-outbox: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-source-fence-outbox-drill.mts
scripts.test:source-fence-crash: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-source-fence-crash-drill.mts
scripts.test:source-fence-h3: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-source-fence-h3-drill.mts
scripts.test:source-export: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-source-export-drill.mts
scripts.test:receiver: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-receiver-drill.mts
scripts.test:control-cutover: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-control-cutover-drill.mts
scripts.test:sigkill: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-cutover-sigkill-drill.mts
scripts.test:b-activation: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-b-activation-drill.mts
scripts.test:sentinel: npm run build -w packages/server && bash ci/redis-sentinel/run.sh tsk-ha-sentinel-drill.mts
scripts.test:partition: npm run build -w packages/server && bash ci/redis-sentinel/run.sh tsk-ha-partition-drill.mts
scripts.test:two-node: npm run build -w packages/server && npx tsx tsk-two-node-drill.mts
scripts.test:pack: npm run build && npx tsx package-boundary-suite.mts && npm pack --dry-run --workspaces
scripts.test:bpc-compat: npm run build && npx tsx bpc-compatibility-suite.mts
